languages.text: {n}扎尔科夫点点头，放下了武器。{/n}“总领在等你。”
languages.original_text: {n}Zarkov nods, lowering his weapon.{/n} "The Seneschal is waiting for you."

traits.locale_text: {n}扎尔科夫点点头，放下了武器。{/n}“总领在等你。”

languages.text: {n}Zarkov hoche la tête et baisse son arme.{/n} « La sénéchale vous attend. »
languages.original_text: {n}Zarkov nods, lowering his weapon.{/n} "The Seneschal is waiting for you."

languages.text: {n}Zarkov, başını sallayarak silahını indiriyor.{/n} "Seneşal sizi bekliyor."

languages.text: {n}Zarkov asiente y baja el arma.{/n} «La Senescal le espera».

languages.text: {n}Zarkov nickt und senkt seine Waffe.{/n} "Die Truchsessin erwartet Euch."

languages.text:
{n}ザルコフは頷き、武器を下げた。{/n}
「執事長が君を待っている」
